description: Authoritative source of truth for shared layout thresholds. Tool grids retain their minimum panes, while immersive entertainment workspaces progressively move contextual rails into accessible drawers.

shell.mobilePortraitMax.formula: The only project-wide structural reflow: common portrait phone width. Desktop, tablet landscape and phone landscape retain their minimum grids.

component.controlsCompactBelow.formula: Component-local compact controls threshold used by narrow panels and the 380-400px memo card rail; it never changes the page grid.

entertainment.musicWideMax.formula: Below the three-column music layout, current-playing context moves into a drawer.

entertainment.musicCompactMax.formula: Below the two-column music layout, collections also move into a drawer.

entertainment.phoneMax.formula: Phone entertainment layouts use compact headers, rows, controls and bottom sheets.

entertainment.watchDesktopMin.formula: The watch room rail is pinned only when the video stage and 320px context rail both fit.

entertainment.watchCompactMax.formula: Below the pinned watch layout, room and sync context move into a drawer.

entertainment.watchLandscapeMax.formula: Short landscape screens prioritize the video stage and hide nonessential framing.

memo.notesDrawerBelow.formula: The memo workspace moves its side-note rail into an overlay when its own container cannot hold all three panes.

memo.outlineDrawerBelow.formula: The memo workspace also moves its outline into an overlay when its own container cannot hold the outline and minimum editor surface.
